archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) merged with Organic precision

headings.instruction: Used for hero and large section titles. Must feel industrial, confident, and ultra-precise.

body.instruction: Clean, highly legible neo-grotesque for technical specs and body copy.

mono.instruction: Use for chapter numbers (01/02/03), data tables, specs, and precise industrial labels.

colors.instruction: Base is stark white/off-white with deep obsidian. The CMYK accents (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow) are used SPARINGLY for hover states, active markers, or the registration mark logo. Do not overload with CMYK; keep it 95% monochrome.

visual_enhancers.hero_background: Faint moving CMYK offset-dot pattern using CSS radial-gradients or a subtle Canvas implementation. Must be highly transparent (opacity 5-10%) so it doesn't distract from the typography.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E5E5 (border-border). Use the 'Grid Borders' strategy to expose the skeleton in the Capabilities and Industries sections.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for the sticky header. High blur (backdrop-blur-xl), bg-white/70, 1px bottom border border-black/5.
visual_enhancers.images: Spotlight/clipped frames. Product photography should have stark, high-end D2C lighting. Use clip-paths or stark square frames with generous padding.

layouts.hero: Full-bleed container. Bold headline, masked line-by-line reveal (Framer Motion). Generous bottom padding.
layouts.manifesto: Numbered chapters (01/02/03). Large mono numbers alongside tight, editorial text. Generous spacing (p-12 to p-24).
layouts.capabilities_grid: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode). Asymmetrical spanning. col-span-full for 'Labels', col-span-4 for 'Thermal Ribbons', etc. 1px borders.
layouts.marquee: Slow editorial marquee for Industries Served. Massive outline text (text-8xl) running in background OR refined serif/mono text with massive gaps (gap-32) running foreground.

motion.hero_reveal: Framer motion: initial { y: '100%', opacity: 0 }, animate { y: 0, opacity: 1 }, transition { staggerChildren: 0.1 } with overflow-hidden on parent to create the masked line-by-line reveal.
motion.parallax: Subtle Framer Motion useTransform based on scrollYProgress for the hero background or product images.
motion.hover_states: Micro-interactions: buttons stretch slightly, images scale up by 1.02, subtle CMYK drop-shadow on hover.

header.instruction: Sticky top-0, z-50. Glassmorphism bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl. Logo on left, anchor links center, 'Get a Quote' solid black pill button right.

button.instruction: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or ultra-sharp rectangular. Dark background, white text. Hover state: invert colors or subtle scale.

form.instruction: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Textarea. Clean, bottom-border-only (flushed) inputs for a premium editorial feel, rather than standard boxes.

printing_press_macro.description: Detailed view of printing rollers. Best for the background or subtle parallax moments.

industrial_factory.description: Clean industrial machinery pipelines. Good for the 'About / Credibility' section.

premium_boxes.description: Premium cosmetic/medical packaging example for the 'Rigid Boxes' product feature.

label_rolls.description: Product label rolls for the 'Labels' core capability.

smartphone_packaging.description: Premium white smartphone box for 'Phone Packaging' deep-dive.

svg_logo_instruction: Create an inline SVG logo composed of 4 overlapping circles or abstract geometric 'M' lines. Apply CSS mix-blend-mode: multiply. Colors: Cyan (#00AEEF), Magenta (#EC008C), Yellow (#FFF200), Black (#000000). Offset them slightly to simulate a misaligned print registration mark. The wordmark should read 'MINDFUL PRINTS' in geometric sans.
instructions_to_main_agent: Since the project uses .js files, ensure all React components are built in .jsx / .js and not TypeScript.
Do NOT use a generic corporate template. Embrace generative minimalism and generous white space.
Implement the masked line-by-line reveal for the H1 in the hero section.
Use grid lines (border-collapse and 1px borders) to give a structural, architectural feel.
Ensure 'Get a Quote' form connects to FastAPI backend (POST /api/quote) with a Product Interest dropdown.
Include a Google Map iframe for Sector 63, Noida.
Create a slow marquee using framer-motion or react-fast-marquee for industries served.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for large layout structures to avoid Shadcn limitations, only using Shadcn for interactive components (Forms, Inputs).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Add micro-animations to every interactive element (hover, focus states).
Do NOT use AI emojis (e.g., 🤖, 💡, 🚀) as icons.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes exist on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
